commit.message:
Redesign portfolio with Apple-inspired minimal aesthetic

Complete rewrite replacing cyberpunk/neon theme with clean, dark,
Apple-style design: Sora + Newsreader typography, generous whitespace,
subtle scroll reveals, radial card glow on hover, and animated
seismogram trace. Updated with real info from earthnote site —
Orca Volcano, NOAA methane seepage, real social links (GitHub,
LinkedIn, Google Scholar, seismic@uw.edu).

fix(knowledge): add anti-false-pattern safeguards to bootstrap prompts

- Add occurrences/count fields to all extracted patterns
- Add confidence field to label review rules, filter out low-confidence

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Claude/fix aisstream reconnection (#9)

* Fix WebSocket startup delay and hanging connection timeout

- Remove premature resetWatchdog() call at plugin.start() before any
  socket exists; the watchdog (refreshRate+60s = ~2min) was the only
  thing killing a hanging initial connection, causing ~2min startup delay
- Move resetWatchdog() into the 'open' event handler so the watchdog
  only ticks after a connection is successfully established
- Add 15s connection timeout in startAisStream() to detect and kill
  sockets stuck in CONNECTING state, triggering normal reconnect logic
- Clear connectTimeout in both 'open' and 'close' handlers to avoid leaks

https://claude.ai/code/session_01Bq9B7vGRkBdzJACvGJRBh8

* Fix GPS update bypassing reconnect backoff, causing duplicate sockets

The position subscription callback (running every refreshRate seconds)
called startAisStream() directly whenever !socket, completely ignoring
any pending reconnect timer. This raced with the exponential backoff
logic, creating a second socket while a reconnect was already scheduled.

Fix: add !reconnectTimer guard to the else-if branch so the position
update only starts a new connection when there is no backoff timer
pending. Also remove the spurious resetWatchdog() call that started
the watchdog with no socket connected.

https://claude.ai/code/session_01Bq9B7vGRkBdzJACvGJRBh8

* feat: add plugin status updates for connection state visibility

Wire up the existing but unused setStatus hook to show connection
state in the SignalK UI: Connecting, Connected (waiting/receiving),
and Disconnected with next retry countdown.

https://claude.ai/code/session_01Bq9B7vGRkBdzJACvGJRBh8

* fix: increase WebSocket handshake timeout from 15s to 30s

The server accepts TCP/TLS connections but can be slow to respond
with 101 Switching Protocols under load. Use ws library's built-in
handshakeTimeout option (30s) for proper error signaling, with a
32s fallback manual timer as a safety net.

https://claude.ai/code/session_01Bq9B7vGRkBdzJACvGJRBh8

---------

feat: skip install when endpoint already healthy with correct version

When reusing existing VMs, check /health endpoint first. If already
running with the expected version, skip the entire install+service
creation flow. Saves 3-5 min on Windows VMs (cold boot + agent wait)
and ~30s on Linux VMs.

fix: include window label in performance snapshot basis text

The evidence count (e.g. '2 race-like runs and 4 recent efforts') stays
the same when switching windows because the algorithm caps at 6 evidence
runs regardless of pool size. Adding the window context ('from your last
12 months') makes it clear the snapshot recomputed over the new window
even when the evidence count doesn't change.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix(straits): resolve 9 code review todos from BF-105 - Remove dead exit animation from FisheyeLens (v-if removes DOM before animation plays) and simplify to entrance-only animation (#133) - Refactor useFisheyeCanvas to options object interface, eliminating fragile 7-positional-parameter signature (#135) - Add textureLoaded signal to useFisheyeCanvas so StraitCircle shows fallback on texture fetch failure instead of blank circle (#140) - Extract useReducedMotion composable to deduplicate matchMedia detection across StraitCircle and StraitMap (#138) - Replace onMounted emit with immediate watcher in FisheyeLens for reliable webgl-status emission regardless of lifecycle ordering (#137) - Add inline shader comments documenting specular magic numbers (#136) - Document WebGL context count constraint (single selection) (#134) - Confirm aria-hidden usage is correct for decorative canvas (#139) - Document position:relative coupling between --selected and v-if (#141) Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6

fix: use -WindowStyle Hidden instead of -NoNewWindow on Windows

az vm run-command and SSH wait for all child processes sharing
the console. -NoNewWindow keeps the endpoint process attached,
blocking the script indefinitely. -WindowStyle Hidden creates
a fully detached process.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
docs(claude): add component promotion rule, remove Quote from no-model list (#68)

* fix(bento-card): add box-sizing border-box to content column

width: 100% + padding without box-sizing: border-box caused the content
column to be parent-width + 32px horizontal padding wide on mobile and
half-desktop cards, overflowing the card and creating a page-level
horizontal scrollbar.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix(bento-block): add horizontal padding to desktop inner container

Zero horizontal padding caused cards to sit edge-to-edge at tablet
viewports below the 1280px max-width. Now matches the 16px (--space-4)
horizontal padding used by mobile and all other page sections.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* feat(quote): add Quote to Contensis content model registry

Quote is now used as a nested component inside BentoCard (quote
variant), so it needs its own CMS model. Adds registry entry,
REGISTRY_TO_DIR mappings in both scripts, and the generated
Quote.contensis.json. Pushed and published to Contensis.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix(bento-card): replace inline quote fields with Quote componentRef

Now that Quote has its own Contensis model, BentoCard references it
via componentRef: 'Quote' instead of duplicating quoteText, quoteName,
quoteRole, quoteAvatar inline.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* docs(claude): add component promotion rule, remove Quote from no-model list

Documents the pattern: if a presentational component is used as nested
CMS content, promote it to the registry first and reference via
componentRef — never inline its fields on the parent.

Claude/fix aisstream reconnection (#8)

* Fix WebSocket startup delay and hanging connection timeout

- Remove premature resetWatchdog() call at plugin.start() before any
  socket exists; the watchdog (refreshRate+60s = ~2min) was the only
  thing killing a hanging initial connection, causing ~2min startup delay

https://claude.ai/code/session_01Bq9B7vGRkBdzJACvGJRBh8

* Fix GPS update bypassing reconnect backoff, causing duplicate sockets

The position subscription callback (running every refreshRate seconds)
called startAisStream() directly whenever !socket, completely ignoring
any pending reconnect timer. This raced with the exponential backoff
logic, creating a second socket while a reconnect was already scheduled.

Fix: add !reconnectTimer guard to the else-if branch so the position
update only starts a new connection when there is no backoff timer
pending. Also remove the spurious resetWatchdog() call that started

Co-authored-by: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: auto-sync Stripe status on load when stale syncError is present

Bootstrap reads Stripe status from DB (sync:false) which may still carry
a syncError from a previously failed sync even if Stripe is working fine.
Instead of showing the stale error banner and requiring a manual refresh,
silently re-sync in the background when syncError is detected — the banner
disappears automatically if Stripe is healthy, stays if there's a real error.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat(straits): add fisheye lens shader effect on selected strait circles Add specular highlight, vignette, and animated entrance (uStrength ramp) to the barrel distortion shader. Create FisheyeLens.vue wrapper component with rAF-driven 600ms ease-out entrance animation and 200ms ease-in exit. Integrate into StraitCircle.vue with reactive prefers-reduced-motion detection and graceful WebGL fallback to plain . - Extend useFisheyeCanvas with uStrength, uSpecular, uVignette uniforms - Add #ifdef GL_FRAGMENT_PRECISION_HIGH guard for mediump-only GPUs - Replace static rim darkening with strength-modulated vignette - Fix canvas dimension rounding (Math.round) to prevent moire artifacts - Expose render() from composable for direct-call during animation Closes BF-105 Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6

Use shared reusable verification config instead of creating one per click

Replace per-click API calls (token fetch + config creation) with a single
shared verification configuration, eliminating 101 orphaned configs and
improving overlay load time. Redirect URLs are passed as session-level
query parameter overrides so each extension install works correctly.

Bump version to 1.0.1.

fix: trading API routes use /tmp on Vercel instead of hardcoded ~/life path

The API routes were reading/writing to ~/life/trading/wheel-trades.json
which doesn't exist on Vercel's serverless filesystem, causing client-side
errors after login. Now uses a shared trades module that:
- Seeds /tmp from bundled data/wheel-trades.json on Vercel
- Uses ~/life/trading/ path on local dev
- Also adds /trading to LayoutShell TITLES map

commit.message:
fix(validate): parse all @ref groups on multi-ref AC annotation lines

The AC annotation regex only matched the first @ref group per line because
it required the // AC: prefix for each match. Lines like
// AC: @spec-a ac-1, @spec-b ac-2 would only validate @spec-a, silently
skipping @spec-b entirely.

Extracted parseACAnnotationLine() helper that splits the line remainder
into individual @ref groups, each with their associated ac-N ids. Both
scanDirForACAnnotations (coverage) and scanDirForACAnnotationsStructured
(validation) now use this shared parser.

Added 13 regression tests: unit tests for parseACAnnotationLine,
integration tests through scanACAnnotations, and end-to-end tests
through validate() confirming secondary refs are validated.

Task: @task-ac-annotation-validation
Spec: @ref-validation

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Story 10.2 : stratégie RSI multi-période + Heikin-Ashi + corrections code review

Implémentation de RsiHaStrategy (2 phases sans timeout) :
- Phase 1 : 3 RSI (périodes 3,5,7) simultanément en zone oversold/overbought
- Phase 2 : attente indéfinie de la confirmation Heikin-Ashi
- SL = min(low) des N dernières bougies (LONG) / max(high) (SHORT)
- Enregistrée sous la clé "rsi_ha" dans StrategyRegistry

Corrections code review :
- _candle_history bornée à max(max_period×10, sl_lookback) — évite O(n²) longue durée
- Reset _signal_direction et _computed_sl_price en entrée de Phase 1
- Test AC5 réel ajouté (test_rsi_ha_no_signal_partial_rsi_ac5, mock RSI(7))
- 14 tests passent, 859 total, 0 régression

commit.message:
perf: max_seq_length を 16384→4096 に削減し packing=True を追加

Attention は O(n²) のためシーケンス長削減が最大の高速化要因。
niconico コメント・チャットデータは 4096 で十分。
packing=True で短サンプルを連結してバッチ効率を向上。
推定トレーニング時間: 33時間 → 数時間に短縮。

commit.message:
Animate approval button slide-in from right on state transition

Frame-based animation for StreamDeck approval buttons (slots 0-3).
When state transitions to awaiting-approval: clear all keys to black,
pause briefly, then slide each button in from the right over ~500ms
with ease-out-cubic easing and a left-to-right stagger.

- Add slideInFrame(), blackSVG(), extractSvgContent() to layouts.ts
- Add animateApprovalSlideIn() method with AbortController for interruption
- Modify renderAll() to detect transition into awaiting-approval
- Use Promise.all() for parallel per-frame key updates
- Restore non-approval slots (4+) after animation completes

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Switch from Socket Mode to HTTP mode for Vercel deployment

- src/app.js — shared Bolt app with ExpressReceiver (processBeforeResponse: true)
- api/slack.js — Vercel serverless entry point, single endpoint for all Slack payloads
- src/index.js — local dev server (Express on PORT, expose via ngrok)
- vercel.json — 30s maxDuration for RAG pipeline headroom
- analytics.ensureInit() — lazy user cache on first request, warm instance reuse
- Remove SLACK_APP_TOKEN (Socket Mode only)

commit.message:
feat(scripts): psychological trigger sequencing framework

Adds a master persuasion order system to script generation based on
analysis of winning Final Expense CTV reference scripts.

- Augments triggers seed with masterOrder, section, isCore fields
  (persuasion sequence: Social Proof → Authority → ... → Autonomy)
- New trigger-sequencer service builds TriggerSequenceContext from
  campaign triggers, sorts by masterOrder, splits into hook/body/cta
  sections, and generates a structured LLM prompt block
- Script generator now accepts triggerSequence, replaces hardcoded
  hint with dynamic sequence text (falls back to DEFAULT_TRIGGER_HINT)
- Adds 90s CTA rules to system prompt: phone twice, "Write that down"
  after first, emotional resolve + urgency between, simplicity close
- Script action loads campaign triggers in parallel and passes
  triggerSequence to the generator

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix(bento-card): add box-sizing border-box to content column (#64)

width: 100% + padding without box-sizing: border-box caused the content
column to be parent-width + 32px horizontal padding wide on mobile and
half-desktop cards, overflowing the card and creating a page-level
horizontal scrollbar.

Apply all code-review fixes (#1–#12)

  consolidate shared helpers (_GLOBAL_ATTRS, _choose_int_dtype, _read_csv,
  _infer_freq_code with IndexError guard, _group_name, _product_priority)

  definitions + _PRIORITY_ORDER, remove hardcoded _GLOBAL_ATTRS, replace
  integer-dtype block with _choose_int_dtype(valid-only subset) fixing
  spurious-zero bug, guard fluxnet_missing_value to f4 vars only

  _choose_int_dtype, HH time_bounds now handled via _FREQ_OFFSET
